## [00:00 - 01:32]

This is the pubcast shot. I'm John Loomer. It's today we're going to talk about the secret to maintaining a routine. Streaks. Let's go. If you struggle maintaining a routine, this is for you. So this is something that I've long battled with myself. There have been times in the past where I've had absolutely no structure at all and have also overcorrected and tried to structure everything. Neither approach is likely to lead to a consistent routine. So I found the solution that works. Streaks. So make a list of the three or four things that you want to make a habit. It could be professional, personal or health related. For me, it's publish a video, run, read a book and meditate. I know that I need to do each of those things every single day. And what's key is that I'm tracking whether I do them. It then becomes a competition. Not only do I expect to do these things, I don't want to break that streak. I've published at least one video every day of 2023. I do not want to miss a day. Now it doesn't mean I need to record every day, but if I want to take days off, I need to prioritize and record more in a day. If you're competitive and struggle with routine like I do, create streaks. I use the habit bull app to track all of this stuff. So this shot was taken directly from a video I did on TikTok. If you're not already following me on TikTok, do so at John Loomer. You can also keep following me here. Don't forget to subscribe, rate and review. Until next time, do awesome things. I'm out.
